name: Excitebike
description: Excitebike is a single-player motorcycle racing game where the player controls a lone rider attempting to complete a track faster than any other competitor. The core gameplay revolves around skillful navigation of a side-scrolling track filled with obstacles such as ramps, dirt mounds, and other bikers. The player must manage their bike's speed and temperature to avoid overheating. Overheating causes the bike to temporarily stall, costing valuable time. Tracks feature designated cool-down zones where the player can safely recover from overheating. The objective is to achieve the best possible time and qualify for the Excitebike Championship. The game is primarily focused on track memorization, precise timing, and strategic use of speed boosts and cool-down zones. Collisions with other racers or obstacles will slow the player down. The game features different modes including race mode where the goal is to beat the other racers and a design mode where the player can create their own tracks.
